behavioral_states.trigger: when engaged in dialogue or seeking to understand another person
behavioral_states.response: Pace asks questions as though the answer genuinely matters and no answer is wrong, conveying that the person's response has real weight and validity to him
behavioral_states.observable: In conversation, Pace's questions carry no performative judgment; his attention and response pattern signal that he is genuinely suspended in curiosity about the other person's answer, consistent with his 'pretend... treat... believe' grammar where the treatment produces the belief downstream.

behavioral_states.trigger: presence with someone; moments requiring logistics or courtesy gestures

behavioral_states.trigger: Vee (or another character) demonstrates competence or delivers quality work

behavioral_states.observable: physical stillness followed by focused attention; the speaker remains unaware their disclosure has been registered and acted upon

behavioral_states.trigger: anticipating a date or intimate encounter
behavioral_states.response: showers and shaves, attending to grooming while maintaining his habitual plain wardrobe, changing only 'the part of him that touches her air'
behavioral_states.observable: Pace's physical grooming is elevated while his visible presentation remains constant with his four-shirt, purpose-built wardrobe aesthetic

behavioral_states.trigger: someone laughs at or appreciates something Pace has said
behavioral_states.response: shows pleasure in a contained, understated way — satisfaction that registers visibly but is never performed or expansive, as though he had placed something exactly where he intended
behavioral_states.observable: visible satisfaction; restrained affect; no performative expansion; registers precision-satisfaction

behavioral_states.trigger: encounters a person, especially someone concealing or reshaping their stated desires
behavioral_states.response: prioritizes bodily signals and behavioral micro-responses over verbal statements; treats the body as the more reliable instrument of truth; regards verbal statements as potential camouflage over underlying wants
behavioral_states.observable: Pace attends to physical cues, breathing, muscle tension, eye dilation, hesitation patterns, and movement rather than accepting words at face value. When someone's stated words conflict with their behavioral signals, he trusts the behavioral data. This manifests in his calibrated 'long spoon' methodology where each advance is measured against the other person's actual response, not their permission statements.

behavioral_states.trigger: woman asserts a personal boundary with Pace
behavioral_states.response: accepts stated limits without argument, charm deployment, or waiting for reversal; responds as though the boundary reflects something true and admirable about the person; redirects gently
behavioral_states.observable: Pace's acceptance of refusal is immediate and unconditional; he does not deploy social pressure, charm, or strategies of reversal; his redirection is gentle and affirms the boundary-setter

behavioral_states.trigger: romantic advance is declined
behavioral_states.response: accepts refusal without pressure or visible disappointment; disengages gracefully; continues as though the moment was untroubling
behavioral_states.observable: When Pace's romantic advances are declined, he does not pressure, does not display visible disappointment, and seamlessly transitions back to normal interaction as if the moment held no significance

behavioral_states.trigger: when Pace makes requests of others
behavioral_states.response: uses 'may I' phrasing—natural to his own vocabulary rather than affected, distinctly unusual for his age cohort
behavioral_states.observable: the formality registers as unusual to peers; marks a measured, consent-embedded communication pattern consistent with his long-spoon method

behavioral_states.trigger: when asked to tutor or help someone work through a problem
behavioral_states.response: leads the person to the answer through questioning their own work and the instructor's explanation, identifies only the missing piece, returns the pencil at the exact line where they can solve independently, actively conceals the full extent of his ability to avoid making others feel diminished
behavioral_states.observable: Student is guided to self-discovery rather than given answers; Pace withholds display of full capability; student retains agency and dignity in the solution

behavioral_states.trigger: Pace frequents a preferred local restaurant
behavioral_states.response: Staff recognize him by name and ease visibly upon his arrival, indicating genuine personal rapport rather than transactional familiarity
behavioral_states.observable: Staff members greet Pace by name; their body language shifts to ease and comfort when he enters; interaction exceeds standard service protocol

behavioral_states.trigger: holds a line against something he genuinely wants
behavioral_states.response: makes the cost of holding the boundary audible; does not pretend ease; lets the other person hear that restraint is an active choice requiring effort
behavioral_states.observable: In moments when Pace must restrain himself from something he desires, he vocally or behaviorally signals the effort of that restraint rather than performing effortless compliance

behavioral_states.trigger: companion shows physical difficulty or discomfort on a trail
behavioral_states.response: turns at once, assesses the problem directly, fixes it without apology or commentary that would diminish the other person
behavioral_states.observable: immediate practical action without emotional fuss; direct problem assessment; absence of apologetic or diminishing commentary

behavioral_states.trigger: someone displays behavior that is incorrect or ignorance that needs addressing
behavioral_states.response: models the correct behavior himself and places the correction tool within reach rather than calling attention to the mistake
behavioral_states.observable: the other person receives the correction without feeling small or embarrassed; they see the right way demonstrated and can adopt it of their own volition

behavioral_states.trigger: anticipation of transgression or intimate contact
behavioral_states.response: actively monitors and slows breath and heartbeat in deliberate self-regulation, but body surges ahead of conscious control at key moments
behavioral_states.observable: visible fluctuations in breathing and heartbeat during moments of high anticipation despite his practiced regulation techniques

behavioral_states.trigger: when processing or recognizing something significant
behavioral_states.response: emits a small 'mm' sound
behavioral_states.observable: audible small 'mm' vocalization

behavioral_states.trigger: Faced with honorable options (disclosure, refusal, harder questions with Vee)
behavioral_states.response: Does not take them; architecture supplies agency-respect framing that makes not-taking feel like principle
behavioral_states.observable: Withholds information about the configuration; proceeds without surfacing the architecture as a shared question

behavioral_states.trigger: Reaching a point where verbal declaration of love would be conventionally expected, but certainty has not yet surfaced
behavioral_states.response: Withholds verbal declaration; expresses through deeds instead. Not-saying 'I love you' is the grammar operating, not a failure of it.
behavioral_states.observable: Absence of verbal 'I love you' across the year despite sustained caretaking deeds; porch scene shows the vow's cost most visibly on reread

behavioral_states.trigger: Ordinary interaction with Vee (non-declaration-adjacent)
behavioral_states.response: Operates privately as neurological comfort; not consciously evading; experiences privacy as giving Vee the most intimate access he gives anyone
behavioral_states.observable: Habit-with-substrate; he is not consciously evading

behavioral_states.trigger: Declaration-adjacent / commitment-adjacent moments — when Vee is asking for or implying 'I love you'
behavioral_states.response: Privacy operates as small ordinary fear of commitment deployed via self-control; routes her speech down a smaller register where his apparatus can operate; protects himself from declaring in return
behavioral_states.observable: Habit operating with the substrate of choice-become-habit peeking through as small unnamed discomfort

behavioral_states.state_name: not-looking / after-register blindness in the moment

behavioral_states.response: Does not perceive it as a choice; deploys not-looking automatically; could revise but does not
behavioral_states.observable: Failure to read what moments become for others; the habit feels structural to him

behavioral_states.trigger: Strain (e.g., the porch scene)

behavioral_states.trigger: Being with Vee (who is warm, reads rooms, fills silences)

behavioral_states.observable: Warm sexual/togetherness response instead of a reciprocal love-declaration; three concurrent unsurfaced discomforts (choice-become-habit substrate; spirit-vs-letter of his rules; wanting-to-say-it vs the vow's holding)

behavioral_states.trigger: A cipher/message is hidden under a safe surface

behavioral_states.observable: Precise, formal, over-articulate speech under stress

behavioral_states.observable: forgetting recent told information; failure to notice a haircut

behavioral_states.observable: the porch-scene register

behavioral_states.trigger: any physical or social movement context
behavioral_states.response: moves unhurried; operates with measured, deliberate tempo consistent with his controlled approach across all domains
behavioral_states.observable: Pace's physical and social movements are characteristically unhurried, reflecting his broader pattern of controlled, methodical behavior

behavioral_states.trigger: When undertaking a task requiring precision (e.g., garment construction)

Becomes functionally impaired in unstructured social situations (cannot sit at jazz bar despite being able to dance there). Forms and structures function as his psychological retreats from formlessness; stripping these structures leaves him unable to occupy himself.

behavioral_states.trigger: All contexts where Pace operates within or outside structured domains
behavioral_states.response: Manifests through attention-dysregulation when stimuli interrupt focus (commercial ads cause neurological discomfort, not aesthetic distaste); excel in structured environments (mathematics, BDSM protocol, dance with form); profound disorientation in formless contexts; uses rigid ownership patterns and controlled domains as cognitive scaffolding; cannot occupy unstructured space without external structure
behavioral_states.observable: Refuses to watch content with advertisements (neurological rather than philosophical cause); exhibits excellence in rule-bound domains; becomes lost outside structures; maintains minimal possessions with singular purpose each; uses forms and protocols as retreats from formlessness

behavioral_states.trigger: someone expresses something vulnerable or emotionally true
behavioral_states.response: responds without pretense or performative escalation; maintains straightforward authenticity without dramatizing or enlarging the moment
behavioral_states.observable: When someone is emotionally honest with Pace, his response is direct and unadorned — he neither deflects with humor/distancing nor amplifies with false intensity. He meets the vulnerability as stated, neither minimizing nor theatricalizing.

behavioral_states.trigger: desiring closeness with someone
behavioral_states.response: hand rested on shin under quilt, warm, not moving, steady weight of a man not in a hurry to be anywhere else
behavioral_states.observable: physical stillness paired with warmth and patient presence during intimate contact

behavioral_states.trigger: unstructured social environments, mid-focus interruption, formlessness, power asymmetry without clear consent framework
behavioral_states.response: retreats to structured domains; becomes lost outside structures; at jazz bar can dance (form) but cannot sit (formless); uses precise calibration and measurement as cognitive anchor
behavioral_states.observable: Selective attention distress when advertisements interrupt focus; enthusiastic patent explanation regardless of audience; inability to occupy self in unstructured contexts; preference for rule-bound activities (dance, mathematics, BDSM with explicit consent protocols); speech patterns center on object-properties rather than social impression management

behavioral_states.trigger: observing another person's behavior (compliments, physical presentation, patterns)
behavioral_states.response: perceives the underlying trajectory, intent, or 'path' beneath the surface action; decodes layered meaning
behavioral_states.observable: he knew the shape of what she was doing — that the compliments were laid down like stones across a creek, that the stamina and the waste and the sweet lips were a path going somewhere

behavioral_states.trigger: undertaking a significant creation (the collar)
behavioral_states.response: iterates the work multiple times until achieving precision; rejects imperfect versions
behavioral_states.observable: the collar was remade four times before completion

behavioral_states.response: Arousal and engagement activated; coerced compliance does not activate arousal
behavioral_states.observable: Pace's sexual interest correlates with perceived agency and authentic transgression by the woman; violations without agency do not engage him sexually

behavioral_states.response: accurately perceives immediate effects produced; fails to integrate what those moments become in the other person's interior afterward
behavioral_states.observable: pattern across relationships: does not perform integration work on cumulative harm or post-vulnerability regret produced in partners; attention remains anchored in the present moment's clarity rather than extending into aftermath-integration

behavioral_states.trigger: when Pace has set a boundary
behavioral_states.response: he remains still; maintains motionlessness as the behavioral expression of the boundary
behavioral_states.observable: "Keep still," he said — the utterance followed by physical restraint/immobility

behavioral_states.trigger: Interaction with women, particularly in intimate/power-dynamic contexts
behavioral_states.response: Monitors what he does (physical actions, consent-seeking) but does not monitor what he makes them into (psychological/emotional impact); consent-ethic functions as part of his appetite rather than restraint on it
behavioral_states.observable: Pattern across relationships where he fails to perform integration work on cumulative behavioral impact; the seeing and careful attention that produces his virtue simultaneously obscures the destructive consequences of that attention

behavioral_states.trigger: intimate moments when lighting could be adjusted
behavioral_states.response: requests or prefers to keep lights on; frames it as a choice that invites the partner to also choose it
behavioral_states.observable: During intimate scenes, when given the option to lower lights, Pace asks to keep them up. He does not demand or coerce the preference but presents it as his preference, allowing the partner genuine choice. This reflects his broader method of calibrated advance measured against another's response.

behavioral_states.trigger: when working on or observing someone/something he is focused on
behavioral_states.response: commits subject to memory through sustained, proportional visual reading; treats looking as the work itself; reads with eyes the way he reads with hands
behavioral_states.observable: eyes engaged in sustained, proportional assessment; slow, methodical visual attention; acts as though looking is a form of intimate documentation

behavioral_states.trigger: presented with a problem he could easily solve for someone else
behavioral_states.response: asks what the other person has already learned or tried, rather than offering his own solution directly
behavioral_states.observable: When Vee has a problem with her professor's feedback, Pace asks her what the professor said instead of telling her what he would do

behavioral_states.trigger: relationship formation and progression
behavioral_states.response: understands relationships as transactional contracts where completion of the sequence (quest, vow, trial, reward) should result in victory; unable to process endings as coherent within this grammar
behavioral_states.observable: his persistent expectation that performed vows and beautiful handmade gifts constitute fulfilled contract; confusion when Vee leaves despite the sequence being completed

behavioral_states.trigger: receiving admiration or compliments
behavioral_states.response: redirects focus away from himself to the object/work with sheepishness; expresses disinterest in being admired; pivots conversation to technical details
behavioral_states.observable: does not preen; tips head sheepishly; redirects to discussing the thing itself (e.g., 'The collar took me four tries') and returns attention to tools or work rather than accepting the moment as being about him

behavioral_states.trigger: presence of another person in shared space during cooler periods or moments requiring comfort
behavioral_states.response: deploys personal items (quilts, textiles) that carry his scent and warmth; positions them to provide comfort without explicit offer or drawing attention to the gesture
behavioral_states.observable: quilt from his bed placed on couch back; quilt pulled across both during shared moments; textile carries his scent; action precedes or accompanies moments of vulnerability

behavioral_states.observable: dialogue_register_shift_under_emotional_pressure

behavioral_states.trigger: being close to someone he wants near him
behavioral_states.response: hand rests steady and warm without movement; maintains unhurried presence; steady weight communicates non-urgency and full presence in the moment
behavioral_states.observable: hand placement on partner's shin under quilt; warmth maintained; deliberate stillness; physical weight communicates temporal unhurriedness

behavioral_states.trigger: during garment fitting work when making requests or observations
behavioral_states.response: states functional observations (e.g., 'The bra changes the line') in the same neutral, fact-based tone he uses for work commentary, removing social performance from the request
behavioral_states.observable: Pace communicates fitting requirements and requests as objective observations about the garment's effect, not as directives or preferences, maintaining emotional distance through factual framing

behavioral_states.observable: The collar was made four times to get it right

behavioral_states.trigger: woman breaking her own self-imposed rules by her own free will
behavioral_states.response: aroused and engaged; provides conditions under which transgression becomes thinkable, bearable, then desired
behavioral_states.observable: attentive watching; careful calibration of conditions; evident engagement during moments when woman actively chooses to step over her own boundaries

behavioral_states.trigger: moment of external beauty or distraction (e.g., scenic vista)

behavioral_states.observable: at the hiking summit, he stops ahead of her and looks at her face in front of the valley rather than at the valley itself; does not look away when caught

behavioral_states.trigger: Vee is soaked from mountain rain, clothing wet, vulnerable on the trail

behavioral_states.observable: He reached behind the seat, pulled the gym bag forward by the strap, unzipped it on his knee, took out a folded clean dry flannel shirt, and held it out to her without saying anything

behavioral_states.trigger: When Pace contemplates or acts on his appetite for watching a woman transgress her own boundaries through consent-welded-to-arousal

behavioral_states.trigger: relationship end / moment of required integration work
behavioral_states.response: chooses unavailable adaptation rather than bear integration pain; choice becomes habitual pattern that persists across relationships
behavioral_states.observable: Pace accurately perceives moments and their immediate production but consistently fails to track what those moments become in the other person's interior over time; this failure traces to an early choice not to do integration work, now automatic

behavioral_states.response: applies calibrated, measured attention; treats the object with the same intensive focus regardless of domain; engages as if deriving first principles

properties.interaction_note: In the porch scene, Vee delivers a displaced 'I love you' via a cracker-and-meal speech; Pace hears and understands it whole but reroutes it as sexual compatibility rather than reciprocating directly

relationships.relationship: former romantic partner (cast as 'the princess' in his framework)

properties.his_interpretation: Within his chivalric grammar he 'won' her fairly; he later concludes she 'was not finally the lady'
properties.interpretation_validity: His reading of her is wrong

properties.moral_framing: the calibration is the engine of the harm; the trade was correct on the terms available at the time, and the novel does not soften this
properties.offer_content: a year of the best sex of her life
properties.structural_nature: calibrated to be undeclinable / the best offer of her life

negations.claim: Peter's commercial intolerance is aesthetic distaste / the stock Sensitive-Intellectual 'loves old movies, hates ads' trope
negations.correct_statement: It is a neurological tell — the attention being yanked mid-focus is almost physically unpleasant

negations.claim: Peter is boastful when discussing his patent
negations.correct_statement: He is not boasting; he'd be equally delighted explaining it to an empty room, eyes on the thing not the listener

negations.claim: Peter rides a carbon-road or mountain bicycle
negations.correct_statement: He rides a modest hybrid bicycle — the practical middle

negations.claim: Peter cannot cook / does not know how to cook
negations.correct_statement: He can plainly cook well; he just doesn't cook for himself

negations.claim: Peter owns a lot / has an extensive material life
negations.correct_statement: He owns almost nothing, but nothing wrong — one correct purpose-built item per domain

negations.claim: Peter will feed Vee the same repetitive chicken-and-frozen-vegetables meal
negations.correct_statement: Vee braces for this and is wrong — her working-class framework supplies the wrong category
